name: J1939TestWaitForPG
title: J1939TestWaitForPG
syntax: long J1939TestWaitForPG( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dword pgn, dword timeout )
description: Wait until the specified parameter group is received.

parameters.name: sourceAddr
parameters.description: source address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard
